title: Manage wildfire hazard reduction programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage wildfire hazard reduction programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop wildfire prevention strategies

pcs.text: Conduct a potential wildfire hazard rating for a target site according to accepted industry rating systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a potential wildfire hazard rating for a target site according to accepted industry rating systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a potential wildfire hazard rating for a target site according to accepted industry rating systems.

pcs.text: Conduct a potential risk assessment from wildfires for buildings, structures and cultural sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a potential risk assessment from wildfires for buildings, structures and cultural sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a potential risk assessment from wildfires for buildings, structures and cultural sites.

pcs.text: Confirm wildfire hazard reduction strategies incorporates social, environmental and economic impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm wildfire hazard reduction strategies incorporates social, environmental and economic impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm wildfire hazard reduction strategies incorporates social, environmental and economic impacts.

pcs.text: Consult and gain support from stakeholders for proposed wildfire hazard reduction strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult and gain support from stakeholders for proposed wildfire hazard reduction strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult and gain support from stakeholders for proposed wildfire hazard reduction strategy.

pcs.text: Develop strategies for proposed wildfire hazard reduction according to workplace priorities, local fire agencies and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies for proposed wildfire hazard reduction according to workplace priorities, local fire agencies and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies for proposed wildfire hazard reduction according to workplace priorities, local fire agencies and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm strategies comply with workplace health and safety, public health and safety and animal welfare regulatory requirements and workplace guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm strategies comply with workplace health and safety, public health and safety and animal welfare regulatory requirements and workplace guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm strategies comply with workplace health and safety, public health and safety and animal welfare regulatory requirements and workplace guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop wildfire prevention strategies

elements.title: Implement and monitor wildfire hazard reduction

pcs.text: Determine equipment, chemicals and bio-agents required for hazard reduction activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine equipment, chemicals and bio-agents required for hazard reduction activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine equipment, chemicals and bio-agents required for hazard reduction activities.

pcs.text: Implement hazard reduction strategies as developed according to workplace plans, policies and procedures, local fire agency and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement hazard reduction strategies as developed according to workplace plans, policies and procedures, local fire agency and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement hazard reduction strategies as developed according to workplace plans, policies and procedures, local fire agency and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Incorporate biosecurity and environmentally sustainable practices in hazard reduction plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate biosecurity and environmentally sustainable practices in hazard reduction plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate biosecurity and environmentally sustainable practices in hazard reduction plans.

pcs.text: Coordinate hazard reduction activities with relevant agencies and other land users
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate hazard reduction activities with relevant agencies and other land users?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate hazard reduction activities with relevant agencies and other land users.

pcs.text: Monitor progress of hazard reduction activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor progress of hazard reduction activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor progress of hazard reduction activities.

pcs.text: Review hazard reduction plans, strategies and operational procedures and process recommendations for change
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review hazard reduction plans, strategies and operational procedures and process recommendations for change?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review hazard reduction plans, strategies and operational procedures and process recommendations for change.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure records are maintained for quantities and type of chemicals or biological agents used for hazard reduction.
